settings.heading: Bring your design to life on products people actually use.
settings.text: Upload artwork, choose a product, and share instructions. We review the file, confirm production details, and send the item for print-on-demand fulfillment.

settings.title: Choose the product
settings.text: Pick apparel, accessories, drinkware, posters, stickers, or business print products.

settings.title: Upload artwork
settings.text: Use high-resolution PNG, JPG, or PDF files. Transparent PNG is best for apparel prints.

settings.title: We review details
settings.text: If the artwork, placement, or resolution needs attention, we contact you before printing.

settings.title: Printed and shipped
settings.text: The production partner prints after purchase and ships the finished order to your address.

settings.heading: Simple enough for one item. Structured enough for bulk orders.
settings.text: This page is designed for customers who want their own artwork printed or need a special product setup beyond the standard catalog.

settings.question: What file type should I upload?
settings.answer: PNG, JPG, and PDF are good starting formats. For apparel, use a high-resolution transparent PNG whenever possible.

settings.question: Will I get a proof?
settings.answer: Add your final proofing policy here. A good launch policy is to contact customers only when artwork quality or placement needs changes.

settings.question: Can I order in bulk?
settings.answer: Yes. Use the contact form with product type, quantity, deadline, delivery city, and artwork details.

settings.heading: Avoid print issues before production.
settings.text: Good files make better products. These answers help customers submit artwork that is easier to print cleanly.
